<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd">
	<modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
	<parent>
		<groupId>com.snc</groupId>
		<artifactId>snc-app-parent</artifactId>
		<version>6.1.0.1</version>
	</parent>
	<artifactId>sn-dex</artifactId>
	<version>4.2.2-SNAPSHOT</version>
	<name>DEX Application and Device Health</name>
	<description>DEX Application and Device Health</description>
	<packaging>pom</packaging>
	<scm>
		<developerConnection>scm:git:ssh://code.devsnc.com/dev/dex-app.git</developerConnection>
		<tag>master</tag>
	</scm>
	<properties>
		<jenkins.email.recipients>laxmanrao.tallury@servicenow.com</jenkins.email.recipients>
		<plugin.dir>com.sn_dex</plugin.dir>
		<!--i18n config-->
		<i18n-extraction-maven-plugin.version>1.0.55</i18n-extraction-maven-plugin.version>
		<i18n-pseudo-maven-plugin.version>1.0.50</i18n-pseudo-maven-plugin.version>
		<i18n.targetFolderRoot>if</i18n.targetFolderRoot>
		<node.version>v16.20.2</node.version>
		<npm.version>8.11.0</npm.version>
		</properties>
	<repositories>
		<repository>
			<id>stable</id>
			<url>http://nexus.proxy.devsnc.com/content/groups/stable</url>
			<releases>
				<enabled>true</enabled>
			</releases>
			<snapshots>
				<enabled>false</enabled>
			</snapshots>
		</repository>
	</repositories>
	<build>
		<plugins>
			<plugin>
				<artifactId>maven-clean-plugin</artifactId>
				<configuration>
					<filesets>
						<fileset>
							<directory>node</directory>
						</fileset>
						<fileset>
							<directory>node_modules</directory>
						</fileset>
					</filesets>
				</configuration>
			</plugin>
			<plugin>
				<groupId>com.github.eirslett</groupId>
				<artifactId>frontend-maven-plugin</artifactId>
				<configuration>
					<nodeVersion>${node.version}</nodeVersion>
					<npmVersion>${npm.version}</npmVersion>
				</configuration>
				<executions>
					<execution>
						<id>install-node-and-npm</id>
						<goals>
							<goal>install-node-and-npm</goal>
						</goals>
					</execution>
				</executions>
			</plugin>
			  <plugin>
			    <groupId>com.snc.test</groupId>
			    <artifactId>sdlc-maven-plugin</artifactId>
			    <version>2.0.4</version>
			    <configuration>
			      <xunitReportsDirectory>${project.build.directory}/xunit-reports/</xunitReportsDirectory>
			      <utFilenamePattern>unittest-report.xml</utFilenamePattern>
			    </configuration>
			    <executions>
			      <execution>
			        <id>sdlc-annotate</id>
			        <phase>verify</phase>
			        <goals>
			          <goal>annotate</goal>
			        </goals>
			      </execution>
			    </executions>
			  </plugin>
		</plugins>
	</build>
</project>",

    "content": "{
    "name": "sn-dex",
    "version": "4.2.1",
    "description": "DEX Application and Device Health",
    "main": "index.js",
    "scripts": {
        "ci:build": "npm ci && npm run unit",
        "extract": "nu extract",
        "moveAnnot": "copyfiles sdlc_api.annotations ./target",
        "cov": "nu mocha -m ci -- --color --timeout 10000 --require @babel/register --require node_modules/@servicenow/commons-test-js-utils/src/sdlc-annotation.js --recursive src/test/js",
        "cov-file": "nu mocha -m ci -- --color --reporter=nyan --timeout 10000 --require @babel/register --require node_modules/@servicenow/commons-test-js-utils/src/sdlc-annotation.js $FILE",
        "unit": "npm run extract && npm run cov && npm run moveAnnot",
        "test": "npm run unit",
        "deploy": "cd plans && npx deploy",
        "zboot": "npx rapidzboot",
        "debug-module-deps": "npm list --all",
        "datacheck": "nu datacheck"
    },
    "nyc": {
        "instrument": false,
        "sourceMap": false,
        "exclude": [
            "src/test/**"
        ],
        "reporter": [
            "lcov",
            "text"
        ],
        "report-dir": "target",
        "check-coverage": true,
        "statements": 80,
        "branches": 68,
        "functions": 88,
        "lines": 80
    },
    "repository": {
        "type": "git",
        "url": "https://code.devsnc.com/dev/dex-app.git"
    },
    "engines": {
        "node": "16.20.2",
        "npm": "8.11.0"
    },
    "license": "ISC",
    "devDependencies": {
        "@babel/eslint-parser": "^7.19.1",
        "@babel/preset-env": "^7.20.2",
        "@babel/register": "^7.18.9",
        "@servicenow/commons-test-js-utils": "^2.0.3",
        "@servicenow/grit": "^3.0.9",
        "babel-plugin-module-resolver": "^4.1.0",
        "chai": "^4.3.7",
        "chai-arrays": "^2.2.0",
        "chalk": "^2.3.0",
        "copyfiles": "^2.4.1",
        "deep-equal-in-any-order": "^1.1.7",
        "eslint": "^8.37.0",
        "eslint-config-lint-now": "^3.0.0",
        "eslint-config-standard": "^17.0.0",
        "eslint-formatter-lint-now": "^3.0.0",
        "eslint-formatter-multiple": "^1.0.0",
        "eslint-plugin-import": "^2.27.5",
        "eslint-plugin-n": "^15.7.0",
        "eslint-plugin-promise": "^6.1.1",
        "minimist": "^1.2.8",
        "mkdir-recursive": "^0.4.0",
        "mocha": "^10.1.0",
        "node-watch": "^0.7.3",
        "now-unit": "^3.0.0",
        "nowunit-plugin-data-check": "^1.1.0",
        "npx": "^10.2.2",
        "postcss": "^8.4.31",
        "postcss-lit": "^1.1.0",
        "postcss-markdown": "^1.2.0",
        "postcss-scss": "^4.0.9",
        "properties-reader": "2.2.0",
        "rapid-zboot": "^1.0.1",
        "shelljs": "^0.8.5",
        "sinon": "^14.0.2",
        "sn-app-deploy": "^1.3.0",
        "stylelint": "^15.11.0",
        "stylelint-config-standard": "^34.0.0",
        "stylelint-config-standard-scss": "^11.1.0",
        "sync-request": "^6.0.0",
        "xml-js": "^1.6.11"
    }
}",

        </dependency>
	</dependencies>
	<!-- Since the parent project is version managed, -->
	<!-- this POM needs to read directly from the Maven repositories. -->
	<build>
		<plugins>
			<!-- Auto-configure Git hooks on first build -->
			<plugin>
				<groupId>org.codehaus.mojo</groupId>
				<artifactId>exec-maven-plugin</artifactId>
				<version>3.1.0</version>
				<executions>
					<execution>
						<id>setup-git-hooks</id>
						<phase>initialize</phase>
						<goals>
							<goal>exec</goal>
						</goals>
						<configuration>
							<executable>bash</executable>
							<arguments>
								<argument>-c</argument>
								<argument><![CDATA[
REPO_ROOT="${project.basedir}"
while [ ! -f "$REPO_ROOT/.githooks/pre-commit" ] && [ "$REPO_ROOT" != "/" ]; do
  REPO_ROOT="$(dirname "$REPO_ROOT")"
done
if [ -f "$REPO_ROOT/.githooks/pre-commit" ]; then
  CURRENT_HOOKS=$(git config --get core.hooksPath 2>/dev/null || echo "")
  if [ "$CURRENT_HOOKS" != "$REPO_ROOT/.githooks" ]; then
    echo "🔧 Configuring Git hooks..."
    git config core.hooksPath "$REPO_ROOT/.githooks"
    chmod +x "$REPO_ROOT/.githooks/pre-commit" "$REPO_ROOT/validate-testcases.sh" "$REPO_ROOT/run-validations.sh" 2>/dev/null || true
    echo "✅ Git hooks configured automatically"
  fi
fi
]]></argument>
							</arguments>
						</configuration>
					</execution>
				</executions>
			</plugin>
		</plugins>
	</build>
	<profiles>
		<!-- This is duplicated from snc-parent, but is needed to bootstrap development -->
		<profile>
			<id>sonar</id>
			<activation>
				<property>
					<name>env.nightly_build</name>
					<value>true</value>
				</property>
			</activation>
			<build>
				<plugins>
					<plugin>
						<artifactId>maven-failsafe-plugin</artifactId>
						<configuration>
							<systemPropertyVariables>
								<glide.codecoverage.debugger.enabled>true</glide.codecoverage.debugger.enabled>
							</systemPropertyVariables>
						</configuration>
					</plugin>
				</plugins>
			</build>
		</profile>
		<profile>
			<id>snc-default-repo</id>
			<activation>
				<file>
					<missing>${user.home}/.m2/use_release.devsnc.com</missing>
				</file>
			</activation>
			<repositories>
				<repository>
					<id>dev</id>
					<url>http://nexus.proxy.devsnc.com/content/groups/dev</url>
					<releases>
						<enabled>false</enabled>
					</releases>
					<snapshots>
						<enabled>true</enabled>
					</snapshots>
				</repository>
			</repositories>
		</profile>
		<profile>
			<id>snc-release</id>
			<activation>
				<file>
					<exists>${user.home}/.m2/use_release.devsnc.com</exists>
				</file>
			</activation>
			<repositories>
				<repository>
					<id>dev</id>
					<url>https://release.devsnc.com/content/groups/dev</url>
					<releases>
						<enabled>false</enabled>
					</releases>
					<snapshots>
						<enabled>true</enabled>
					</snapshots>
				</repository>
			</repositories>
		</profile>
	</profiles>
</project>",

{
  "type": "text",
  "file": {
    "filePath": "/Users/vishalveera.reddy/git/dex-app/docs/api/README.md",
    "content": "# DEX App API Documentation

## Overview

The DEX (Digital Employee Experience) application exposes server-side Script Includes and client-callable APIs for device health monitoring, remedial actions, and user experience metrics.

## Core Script Includes

| Script Include | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `DEXUtils` | General utility functions for DEX operations |
| `DEXStatusHelper` | Device and service status evaluation |
| `DEXRemedialActionsUtils` | Remedial action creation, execution, and lifecycle |
| `DEXRemedialActionExecutionUtil` | Execution engine for remedial actions |
| `DEXEventConsumerManager` | Event-driven consumer management |
| `DEXSAMIntegrationMgr` | Software Asset Management integration |
| `DEXScheduledJobController` | Scheduled job orchestration |
| `DEXSourceMetricConfig` | Metric source configuration |
| `DEXServiceMonitor` | Service health monitoring |

## Data Check Plugin

NowUnit data-check plugin validates:
- ACL configurations
- Dictionary naming conventions
- XML structure integrity
- Scheduled job definitions

Run with: `npm run datacheck`

## Further Reading

Based on my analysis of the code, here's a summary of what I found:

## DEX Application Structure

### dex-app (ServiceNow Plugin)
- **Path**: `/Users/vishalveera.reddy/git/dex-app/dex-app`
- **Package**: `sn-dex` v4.2.1 - A ServiceNow DEX (Digital Employee Experience) application
- **Key Scripts**:
  - `dex_application_data_manager.js` - Manages application data
  - `dex_populate_system_time_insights.js` - System time insights
  - `dex_populate_battery_health_insights.js` - Battery health insights
- **Contains**: ~100 XML configuration files (sys_script_include, sys_ux_event, etc.)

### dex-test (Maven Test Project)
- **Path**: `/Users/vishalveera.reddy/git/dex-test`
- **Structure**: Multi-module Maven project (69 POM files)
- **Key Test Modules**:
  - `dex-metricrule-test`
  - `dex-uitask-test`
  - `dex-metricrule-test`
  - `dex-common-test`
  - `dex-report-test`
- **Technologies**: REST Assured, Spring Boot, JUnit testing
- **Parent POM**: Manages shared dependencies and configurations

The application appears to be a ServiceNow plugin that collects and manages digital employee experience metrics (battery health, system time insights, etc.) with corresponding integration tests.
